creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 181074
svn diff (patch) for lang/picoc

I find this useful, and I see it's slated for the scrap heap
due to a bad MASTER_SITES. So I'm fixing it, by pointing MASTER_SITES
to it's new location on GitHub. While here, update the WWW, update
patch files, distinfo && add place me as MAINTAINER.

That's pretty much it!

Please find the svn diff && QA LOG; attached to this pr(1)

Thanks!

--Chris
